title: Tama’s Kidnapping Exposes Wano’s Cruelty
description: On pages 9–12, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Kiku, Unknown person #12, Tama as Luffy and Zoro push into Kuri and Bakura Town as Tama’s kidnapping exposes the cruelty of the Beast Pirates.
scene: Luffy and Zoro move through Kuri and Bakura Town while Tama’s kidnapping pulls them into open conflict with the Beast Pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Only essential merchants and tradesmen were allowed to remain.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The rest were forced out of the town.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: This is what Bakura Town has become.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: WANAAAH!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There must be something going on around here...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A Sumo Wrestler just came flying this way...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Is there a Sumo match nearby!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Could he really have been blown this far by another Sumo Wrestler!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Over- wheellling strength!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: He's so strong....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: As expected, will nobody topple him!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Will no one be able to take down urnima, the yokuzuna of the flower capital?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: URASHMA is SO BIG AND STRONGGE GGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGG

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: wano country Sumo writer - yokozuna URA SHIMA

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: We're having a special competition today!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Whoever is able to take down urnima will earn a hefty 500 gold!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If there's anyone who is confident in their ability... come and try your luck!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's way too strong!! There's no way anybody will bet against him!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It doesn't matter if there are a lot of people in the ring....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's managed to take down 19 people, all on his own!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We have a perfect plan. We'll claim that prize!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: How many Bones has he broken!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: 10 ARMS, 15 legs, 52 ribs...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: 4 Skills, 7 Spines.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's 88 broken bones in total! And four contestants are unaccounted for!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: His strength is almost inhuman!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Take down urna! I placed my bet on you guys!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: The Undefeated Monster... YOKOZuna, Urashima!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Master crashes AAA

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Ready, set...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Begin!!

dialogue.speaker: Kiku
dialogue.text: Kikuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuu

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: So you followed me here after all!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Have you decided to be my bride?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What did he say!? She's going to marry urna...?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What a Wild Turn of Events!! To think that a woman has already sworn herself to Urashima!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What a lucky gal!! It's a tale of love at first sight!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: What a huge scandal!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: There's no point in hiding behind me.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: He decides everything on his own...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Kiku!! There's a tournament happening in Bakura town later today!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I will... I will show you how cool I can be!! Come watch if you're interested!!

dialogue.speaker: Tama
dialogue.text: O-TAMA...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Hang in there!!

summary: This section advances the Wano Country - Kuri storyline with 46 dialogue beats. The rescue of Tama brings Luffy, Zoro, Kiku, and Law into direct contact with Wano’s local oppression.
